title: Origins: Interloper
description: An origin that uses its leaf-like body to interlope.
body:
# 🌸 Interloper **(Impact 2 Origin)** *As light as leaves, these tree traveling arachnids elude capture with their airborne elegance.* ## • Powerlist •
🪷 Falling Petals You passively gain up to 4 Petals while on the ground, acting as a source for your abilities.
Info Your jump height is increased by a block with each Petal you gain, but you cannot jump at all without Petals.
🕸️﻿ Soaring Silk: Primary Ability Activate while looking at a block to be ricocheted in the opposing direction, consuming a Petal with each use.
💨﻿ Burst: Secondary Ability Briefly shoot backwards continuously, consuming a Petal with each use.
🗡️ Whistling Tusk The distance you fall translates to your damage dealt, allowing a much stronger critical hit on the way down. Landing airborne, melee attacks after a Petal is consumed will allow you to regain one, and reset fall damage.
Info Gaining Petals through this method will heal you based on the damage you dealt.
🪞 Closer Each use of your abilities resets your fall distance, acting as if you originally fell from the height you activated it.
Info After using an ability, you can attack a surface or entity just before landing to save yourself from fall damage, and pogo yourself into the air.
🍃 Aerachno You fall slower and have more aerial control, but you still take fall damage upon landing. You only take fall damage when falling from a height of 8 blocks or more.
🌿 Leaflike Your regeneration is naturally 25% slower and only usable on the ground, increasing in speed by 25% with each Petal you have. You take no fall damage from landing on leaves.
❌ Splat You take increased damage from falling.
🪲 Arthropod You react to the Bane of Arthropods enchant.
## • Additional • This origin has been in development since January, and a lot of the mechanics wouldn't exist without ideas from Arti, and awesome code from 8hiny and null.arbiter!
